functional_requirements.requirement: The system allows the user to view and adjust the time.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: A digital watch lets the user view and adjust the time.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system enables the user to switch between changing hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes by pressing a button.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: By pressing a button, the user can switch between changing the hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system allows the user to increase values while adjusting time settings.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: While adjusting, the user can increase the values as needed.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system provides an alarm feature that can be turned on or off by the user.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The watch also has an alarm feature. The user can turn the alarm on or off.

functional_requirements.requirement: When the set alarm time matches the current time, the system triggers the alarm to ring.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: When the set time matches the current time, the alarm starts ringing.

functional_requirements.requirement: The user can stop the alarm by pressing a specific button.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can stop it by pressing the alarm button again.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system has a light feature that turns on when the user presses a button and turns off when the button is released.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: In addition, the watch has a light. When the user presses the light button, the display lights up, and it turns off when the button is released.

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
A digital watch lets the user view and adjust the time. By pressing a button, the user can switch between changing the hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes. While adjusting, the user can increase the values as needed.

The watch also has an alarm feature. The user can turn the alarm on or off. When the set time matches the current time, the alarm starts ringing. The user can stop it by pressing the alarm button again.

In addition, the watch has a light. When the user presses the light button, the display lights up, and it turns off when the button is released.
>>>
